# Daily Report — 2026-05-24

## Task Completed
Added `list_request_items` tool to retrieve requested items (sc_req_item / RITM
records) within a service request.

**What was built:**
- `ListRequestItemsParams` Pydantic model — `request_id` (required), optional
  `state` filter, `limit`, and `offset` for pagination.
- `_format_request_item()` helper — normalises reference fields (`cat_item`,
  `request`, `assigned_to`, `assignment_group`, `opened_by`) from dict to
  display value; maps 15 fields including `quantity`, `price`, and timestamps.
- `list_request_items()` function — resolves the parent REQ number or sys_id
  via the existing `_resolve_request_sys_id` helper, then queries
  `sc_req_item` with `request=<sys_id>` filter; supports optional state filter
  and full pagination (`has_more` / `next_offset`).
- Registered in `__init__.py` (import + `__all__`).
- Registered in `tool_utils.py` (import + tool definition tuple).
- Added to `service_desk` and `full` packages in `config/tool_packages.yaml`.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1212
- Coverage: 91%
- `request_tools.py` coverage: 95%
- All passing: yes
- New tests added: 20 (in `tests/test_request_item_tools.py`)

## Security
Pre-existing system-package vulnerabilities (pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, wheel)
— none in project dependencies. No new issues introduced.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/request_tools.py` — new constants, model, helper, and tool function
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — import + `__all__` entry
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import + tool definition
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `service_desk` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_request_item_tools.py` — 20 new tests
- `.github/DAILY_BACKLOG.md` — item moved to Completed
